scope: PART2 §6.4 CI/CD + §6.11 이벤트/로깅 시스템 검증 (vs PHASE_B6_CICD_PIPELINE, PHASE_B2_PROJECT_STRUCTURE)

mismatches.fact: PART2 lists CI/CD as separate workflow files (quality-python.yml, quality-rust.yml, etc.)
mismatches.detail: PART2 lists 14 separate workflow YML files. PHASE_B6 §2 L50 defines 'ci.yml' as a single unified workflow per B2. PART2 has NOTE (XREF-V0-19) explaining this is for readability, but the actual file structure differs. The PART2 comment correctly notes this discrepancy.

PART2 lists 14 workflow entries. PHASE_B6 defines ci.yml (unified) + release.yml + build-docker.yml + deploy-v2.yml + deploy-v3.yml + security scan (inline) + build-python.yml. The count differs due to PART2 splitting by role vs B6's unified structure.
PHASE_B6 §6.1 confirms Docker Compose deployment for V2. Method matches (SSH + docker compose pull).

match_details.detail: SOT §2.1 confirms ruff (lint+format) + mypy (type check). Match.
SOT §2.3 confirms eslint + tsc + prettier. Match.
SOT §2.4 confirms Pydantic v2 model import test. Match.
SOT §3.2 confirms cargo test + tarpaulin coverage. Match.
SOT §3.3 confirms vitest + v8 coverage. Match.
SOT §4.1 has matrix: ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, macos-latest (arm64+x64). Match.
SOT §4.3 confirms V2+ Docker build with 3 services. Match.
SOT V3 strategy (§1.1 table) confirms K8s auto deployment with ArgoCD.
SOT §1.2 shows security scan running in parallel. Match on concept.
SOT §5 defines release pipeline with SemVer + Changelog + GitHub Release. Match.

PART2 inline comment lists breakdown: oc.*33 + wf.*4 + ui.builder.*14 + ui.frontmini.*7 + ui.core.*7 + ui.gate.*9 + ui.node.*2 + ui.main.*12 + ui.tool.*6 + ui.memory.*5 + ui.cli.*10 + mem.*2 + storage.*5 + agent.*3 + sdar.*3 = ~122-123. Reasonable match.
PART2 lists 36 failure codes. Count matches D2.1-D2 SOT.
PART2 lists 23 fallback entries. Count matches D2.1-D2 SOT.

missing.sot_fact: PHASE_B6 defines ci.yml as a single unified workflow file
missing.detail: PART2 splits into 14 separate files for readability. HTML comment (XREF-V0-19) acknowledges B6 unified structure, but implementer may be confused by the split.

missing.sot_fact: Ruff line-length = 100, select includes 13 rule codes (E,F,W,I,N,UP,S,B,A,C4,DTZ,T20,ICN)
missing.detail: PART2 §6.4 table only summarizes 'ruff lint + mypy'. The specific ruff config (line-length=100, 13 select codes) is not in PART2 §6.4 but was added to AI prompts in v14.0.0 changelog.

check_details.detail: PART2 does not include branch strategy details. This is implementation-level detail omitted.
PART2 does not mention commit message convention. Expected to be handled at implementation time.
Not mentioned in PART2. Tool-specific detail.

check_details.sot_fact: Tauri build matrix: 4 targets (linux-x64, windows-x64, macos-arm64, macos-x64)
check_details.detail: PART2 L2568 states '크로스 플랫폼 빌드 (Win/Mac/Linux)'. Implicitly covers this.
PART2 does not list specific Docker service names.
PART2 L2572 states 'Docker Compose SSH 배포'. Match.
PART2 does not list build-python.yml. Not critical since it is a standard step.
PART2 L2567 lists 'coverage-report.yml: 3개 언어 커버리지 병합'. Match.
Not explicitly in PART2 CI/CD section. Standard practice expected.

findings.description: PART2 CI/CD를 14개 개별 workflow로 분리 표기하나 PHASE_B6/B2 정본은 ci.yml 단일 통합 워크플로우
findings.evidence: PART2 L2556 NOTE (XREF-V0-19)에서 인지 중이며 구현 시 B6 통합 구조를 따르라고 안내. 실질 위험 낮음.
PHASE_B6 §1.3 정본에 5개 브랜치 전략 명시. PART2 구현 가이드에서 누락.

findings.description: Docker 서비스명 3개 (vamos-orange-core, vamos-blue-nodes, vamos-api-gateway)가 PART2에 미기재
findings.evidence: PHASE_B6 §4.3 matrix에 3개 서비스 정의. V2 구현 시 참조 필요.
